# Multiple cards

```yaml
incident_card:
  schema_version: 1
  id: INC-2026-107
  status: detected
  title: First incident card
  severity: low
  environment: production
  service: payment-api
  detected_at: "2026-01-15T08:10:00Z"
  description: "First card has enough text to pass the field length check."
```

```yaml
incident_card:
  schema_version: 1
  id: INC-2026-108
  status: detected
  title: Second incident card
  severity: low
  environment: production
  service: payment-api
  detected_at: "2026-01-15T08:10:00Z"
  description: "Second card has enough text to pass the field length check."
```
